innateAbility.name: Momentum
innateAbility.description: Grants bonus armor corresponding to the Titan's bonus movement speed values above the Titan's base movement speed.

abilities.name: Echo Stomp
abilities.description: The Titan stomps and deals physical spell damage within the radius.Additionally applies a brief stun duration, and causes enemy units to become unconscious.

abilities.name: Astral Spirit
abilities.description: The Titan sends forth the Spirit, damaging any units it passes through.

abilities.name: Return Astral Spirit
abilities.description: The Spirit returns to the Titan upon his command.

abilities.name: Move Astral Spirit
abilities.description: Moves the Spirit to a point-targeted location upon the Titan's command.

abilities.name: Natural Order
abilities.description: Reduces all elements to their basic levels, removing base armor and base magic resistance from nearby enemy units.

abilities.name: Earth Splitter
abilities.description: Sends forth a jagged crack in front of the Titan that implodes after a slight delay.The implosion applies movement speed slow, deals both magicial and physical spell damage corresponding to the affected enemy units' max health.

talents.right: +30 Astral Spirit Bonus Damage per Hero

talents.left: x0.2 Momentum Move Speed to Attack Speed Factor

talents.right: +2.5% Astral Spirit Move Speed per Hero
